report.summary: Cycle-close v6: No new commits since e3f63fc (last commit added 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker). 634 published slugs, 111 missing page.tsx files. 4 files with TS errors (non-blocking, ignoreBuildErrors enabled). 55 uncommitted files accumulating. All 6 API routes structurally healthy with proper cache TTLs. 4 pages remain in publish queue.

sections.title: QA: Page & Build Verification
items: 4 recently built pages verified: crypto-staking-guide-2026, euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026, flash-loans-defi-guide-2026, stablecoin-yield-tracker — all have page.tsx, metadata exports, no 'use client' conflicts
634 total published slugs; 111 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES still missing page.tsx files (wallets, investing/best, taxes, blog, courses categories)

141 TypeScript errors across 4 files: structured-data.examples.ts (documentation file, non-critical), crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026
Build is not blocked (ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config), but 3 learn pages have TS syntax issues that should be fixed
Live site HTTP checks could not be performed — sandbox egress blocked to degen0x.com

sections.title: Data Engineer: API Routes Health
items: All 6 public API route files present and structurally valid: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs properly configured: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (dynamic)
All routes use stale-while-revalidate pattern with CDN cache headers
Fallback data present in market-dominance and prices routes; fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields rely on stale cache only — no hardcoded fallback
Rate limiting only implemented on cache-stats and health routes — public-facing API routes (prices, trending, etc.) lack rate limiting protection
Live API response checks could not be performed — sandbox egress blocked

sections.title: DevOps: Deployment & Infrastructure
items: Latest commit e3f63fc deployed — 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker, published pages update (95 files changed, +10,972 -644 lines)
Previous commit 3b2dd28 was a build fix removing 'use client' from 4 learn pages that export metadata — pattern is stable now
55 uncommitted files in working tree (5 modified, ~50 untracked) — mostly reports and social drafts accumulating
Vercel deployment status could not be verified from sandbox (egress blocked) — no build errors expected given ignoreBuildErrors config
5 modified files pending commit: package-lock.json, reports/2026-04-02-community.json, learn/crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026/page.tsx, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, published-pages.ts

sections.title: Project Manager: Cycle Summary

Publish queue nearly empty: only 4 pages remaining in PUBLISH_QUEUE out of 634+ total published
Carry-over: 111 published slugs still need page.tsx files built (major backlog in wallets, investing/best, taxes, blog, courses)
Carry-over: 3 learn pages with TS syntax errors need fixing (arbitrage strategies, lido-v3, rwa-yield comparison)
Carry-over: Rate limiting should be added to public API routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields)
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention — all systems appear operational
